llm.title: OpenAI/Ollama Integration
llm.description1: You can make use of the OpenAI API to help you generate content, or improve your writing while composing your resume.
llm.description2: You have the option to <1>obtain your own OpenAI API key</1>. This key empowers you to leverage the API as you see fit. Alternatively, if you wish to disable the AI features in Reactive Resume altogether, you can simply remove the key from your settings.
llm.description3: You can also integrate with Ollama simply by setting the API key to `sk-1234567890abcdef` and the Base URL to your Ollama URL, i.e. `http://localhost:11434/v1`. You can also pick and choose models and set the max tokens as per your preference.

hero.title: The Modern, AI-Powered <1/> Resume Builder
hero.subtitle: Craft your perfect resume with the power of AI. Simple, smart, and secure.

main.title: System Core Functionality & Architecture
main.subtitle: Built with modern Web tech stack and LLM capabilities, creating a complete workflow from data collection to content generation and document export

background.title: Research Background & Significance
background.subtitle: Addressing current job market pain points, reconstructing the resume creation process with cutting-edge technology

market.title: Intensified Market Competition
market.desc: HRs spend only 6 seconds on average reviewing a resume. Traditional generic resumes struggle to stand out among massive candidates.

pain.title: Traditional Creation Pain Points
pain.desc: Job seekers face issues like tedious formatting, lack of pertinence, and empty content, making it hard to match different job requirements.

solution.title: AI Empowered Solution
solution.desc: Deeply understanding person-job matching logic through LLMs, realizing intelligent customization and instant optimization of resume content.

comparison.title: System Advantage Comparison
comparison.subtitle: Breaking through the limitations of traditional resume creation

traditional.title: Traditional Way
points: Relies on generic templates, lacks personalization
Low content matching with Job Description

ourSystem.title: Intelligent Builder
points: Targeted content generation based on JD
RAG engine ensures industry terminology accuracy

innovations.title: Key Innovations
innovations.subtitle: Technical breakthroughs and application innovations of this project

tech.title: Technical Innovation
tech.desc: Pioneered a resume-job matching algorithm based on Hybrid Search, solving the precision problem of long-text semantic understanding.

mode.title: Model Innovation
mode.desc: Introduced 'Lighthouse' scoring mechanism into resume quality assessment, establishing a standardized resume health indicator system.

interact.title: Interaction Innovation
interact.desc: Implemented WYSIWYG streaming generation experience, supporting instant AI polishing and rewriting of local resume content.

scenarios.title: Typical Scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Customized solutions for users at different career stages

fresh.title: Fresh Graduates
fresh.desc: Lack experience? AI mines highlights from school projects and internships, converting them into workplace language.

change.title: Career Switchers
change.desc: Mismatched skills? Intelligently analyzes transferable skills from past experience, reconstructing resume narrative logic.

expert.title: Senior Experts
expert.desc: Too much experience? Automatically condenses redundant info, focusing on core achievements and leadership demonstration.

algorithm.title: Core Algorithm Strategy
algorithm.subtitle: Dual-engine drive based on RAG and Prompt Engineering

rag.title: Vector Retrieval Enhancement (RAG)
rag.desc: Builds a vector database of professional skills and industry terms, retrieving the best matching expression paradigms via cosine similarity to solve LLM hallucinations.

prompt.title: Structured Prompt Engineering
prompt.desc: Designs CoT (Chain of Thought) prompt chains, guiding the model to generate high-quality content in 'Analyze-Identify-Reconstruct-Polish' steps.

metrics.title: Experimental Effect Analysis
metrics.subtitle: System performance evaluation metrics based on test sets

architecture.title: Technical Architecture & Implementation
architecture.subtitle: Adopting cutting-edge AI tech stack and modern frontend frameworks to build a high-performance, high-availability intelligent resume system

llm.title: LLM Engine
llm.description: Integrates OpenAI GPT-4 and local open-source models (Ollama), achieving precise content generation and optimization via Prompt Engineering.

rag.title: RAG Enhancement
rag.description: Builds vector databases to realize semantic matching between Job Descriptions (JD) and resume content, significantly improving generation pertinence.

frontend.title: Modern Frontend Engineering
frontend.description: Based on Next.js 14 and React Server Components, combined with Tailwind CSS to achieve responsive design and extreme performance.

security.title: Privacy Security Architecture
security.description: Uses IndexedDB for pure frontend data storage, zero server-side data retention, ensuring user privacy security from the architectural level.

1.title: Resume Parsing
1.description: Intelligently extracts key information from PDF/Word resumes, converting it into structured data.

2.title: Job Matching Analysis
2.description: Deeply analyzes target JDs, identifying skill gaps and keyword matching degrees.

3.title: Smart Optimization Generation
3.description: Based on analysis results, uses LLM to rewrite resume content, highlighting core strengths.

4.title: Multi-modal Export
4.description: Generates high-quality PDF documents, supporting various professional layout styles.

ai.title: Smart Detection, Professional Advice
ai.description: Built-in smart grammar check, automatically identifies inappropriate expressions, provides professional modification suggestions, making your resume more outstanding.

export.description: Supports exporting in multiple formats for easy sharing and backup.

privacy.description: All resume data is fully stored locally, no need to worry about privacy leaks. Support data export backup, ensure your resume data is always available.

preview.title: Live Preview
preview.description: See your changes in real-time as you type. No more guessing how your final resume will look.

dnd.title: Drag & Drop Interface
dnd.description: Effortlessly reorder sections to highlight your strengths with an intuitive drag-and-drop interface.

contact.title: Connect with Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you. Reach out to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

aiModal.title: AI Lab
aiModal.description: Analyze and optimize your resume to match target job requirements, or get a professional Lighthouse-style analysis report.

mockInterview.title: AI Mock Interviewer
mockInterview.description: Paste the job description below to start a realistic mock interview session based on your resume.

coverLetter.inputDesc: Paste the JD here to generate a tailored cover letter.
coverLetter.emptyState: Your cover letter will appear here

careerPath.emptyState: Enter a target role or let AI infer it from your resume to generate a career path plan.

preparer.in_progress: Preparing your resume and job description...

parallel_analyzer.in_progress: Analyzing your resume from multiple dimensions...

prepare_research.in_progress: Preparing for web research based on JD...

web_searcher.in_progress: Searching the web for key information...

reflection.in_progress: Analyzing search results and identifying gaps...

final_answer.in_progress: Synthesizing research findings into a summary...

rewriter.in_progress: Rewriting the resume based on the analysis report...

placeholder.title: Get Professional Analysis
placeholder.description: Our AI will perform a detailed analysis of your resume, providing scores and actionable feedback on impact, clarity, and keyword optimization.

createTab.initialMessage: Hello! I'm ResuMate, your personal resume crafting assistant. To start, what kind of job or industry are you targeting?
createTab.defaultReply: Sorry, I'm having a little trouble right now. Could you please rephrase that?
createTab.errorReply: I seem to have encountered an issue. Please try sending your message again.
createTab.retryFailed: Request failed after multiple retries. Please try again later.

optimizePlaceholder.description: Paste a job description and click "Start Optimization" to let the AI tailor your resume for your dream job.
